articles.title: Justin Sun ridicules Germany’s Bitcoin sell-off after UEFA Euro knockout
articles.description: Justin Sun, the founder of the Tron blockchain, made fun of Germany and its massive BTC sell-off. Justin suggested that Germany lost in the UEFA Euro 2024 Cup quarter-finals because she ‘sold too much Bitcoin.’ Other X users and BTC enthusiasts added to the tweet, with some X users suggesting that Germany should have HODLed.

articles.title: Solana Bounces Back After Failing To Break $118 Support – Time To Buy?
articles.description: Solana (SOL) recently experienced a price pullback after failing to break below the crucial $118 support level. This rebound indicates strong buying interest at this support level, preventing further declines and stabilizing the price. The $118 mark has proven to be a resilient support, with market participants closely watching Solana’s price action for signs of […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Miners Struggle as Production Costs Rise
articles.description: Bitcoin miners face profitability challenges due to rising production costs, forcing many to shut down unprofitable machines or exit the industry.

articles.title: DOGE, XRP, ADA Eye Meteoric Rise on Metric's Signal
articles.description: Dogecoin, XRP, ADA significantly down from 2024 highs

articles.title: Spot Ethereum ETFs will attract 25% more US investors: Grayscale
articles.description: Grayscale’s latest survey reveals that if the spot Ethereum ETF gets approved, 25% more US voters will show interest in investing in Ethereum. Last year, the survey showed that 40% of voters wanted to add cryptocurrencies to their portfolios. At the moment, it has increased to 47%. The main motivation behind Americans’ newfound love for […]
